data.title: THE SOURCE VERIFICATION CHECKLIST.
blocks: Does the source exist? — Search the journal, database, or DOI directly
Does the source say what Claude claimed? — Read the abstract or full text
Is the citation format correct? — Check author names, year, volume, pages
Did I provide this source, or did Claude generate it? — If generated, treat as lead only

data.title: COMMON MISTAKES
blocks: Asking for a literature review without providing sources.
Treating named frameworks as citations.
Forgetting "not stated in excerpt."
Using the same verification standard for summaries of provided text vs. generated citations.
Accepting a plausible DOI.
